stemHtml: In an aircraft NOT fitted with an EFIS the master caution light illuminates and an audible alarm is triggered. How does the crew find information about the cause of the caution indication?

options.a: The master caution will indicate the nature of the problem.
options.b: From the annunciator lights on the central warning panel.
options.c: This can only be distinguished from the audible alert.
options.d: Only from a message on the ECAM.
